title: ANIMAL CONTROL - 211info
text: CITY OF BOARDMAN ANIMAL CONTROL Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides animal control services such as responding to reports of local animal code violations and dog licensing. Do not respond to reports of at large chickens. 200 City Center Circle Boardman, OR 97818 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 676-5317 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 676-5317 Alternate (541) 481-9252 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: City of Boardman SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: From I-84 East/West, take Exit 164 and turn south onto Main Street. Travel 0.25 miles and turn right on City Center Drive. City Hall is straight ahead. Services: Animal Control Animal Licenses Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - CITY OF BOARDMAN CONSUMER ASSISTANCE AND PROTECTION - LAW ENFORCEMENT COMPLAINTS LAW ENFORCEMENT AGENCIES - POLICE DEPARTMENT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
